title: alstroemeria angustifolia subsp. angustifolia
intro: Alstroemeria angustifolia subsp. angustifolia, also known as the narrow-leaved Peruvian lily or narrow-leaved alstroemeria, is a plant species in the family Alstroemeriaceae. It is used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, inflammation, and respiratory problems, due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, lower blood pressure, and act as an antioxidant, which can help protect against cell damage and promote overall well-being. Alstroemeria angustifolia subsp. angustifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential health benefits.
